entities.name: File Classification
entities.context: A system for categorizing files based on their purpose and status.

entities.name: Temporary
entities.context: A category for draft files and scratch notes.

entities.name: Keep
entities.context: A category for important files to preserve.

entities.name: Ignore
entities.context: A category for system files that are not needed.

relationships.context: Temporary is one of the categories defined in the File Classification system.
